error.scenario: Target BigQuery schema updated without transformation rule update
error.trigger: Target schema evolution not reflected in transformation layer

error.scenario: Compliance-required fields absent from source payload
error.trigger: Source system compliance module disabled during maintenance

error.scenario: DAG variable or connection missing in Airflow metadata
error.trigger: Environment variable or connection not migrated to new Airflow instance

error.scenario: Third-party service returning unexpected response format
error.trigger: External dependency changing response format without notice

error.scenario: Database view dependency not refreshed before pipeline query
error.trigger: Materialised view refresh job failed silently

error.scenario: CDC change events replayed from beginning
error.trigger: Change data capture offset reset to earliest position

error.scenario: Silent data corruption causing downstream validation failure
error.trigger: Data corrupted without error at source causing failure at validation stage

error.scenario: Upstream pipeline producing empty output flagged as failure
error.trigger: Empty output from upstream treated as dependency failure

error.scenario: Partial extraction due to source pagination error
error.trigger: API pagination token expiring mid-extraction

error.trigger: Source query not selecting all required fields

error.trigger: B2B transaction type not mapped to customer segment logic

error.scenario: Records dropped during transformation due to filter logic error

error.trigger: Source data masking applied to previously unmasked field

error.trigger: API pagination token expiring mid-extraction

error.scenario: DAG run timeout exceeded maximum allowed runtime

error.scenario: Slow transformation logic on unexpectedly large dataset
error.trigger: Source data growth outpacing transformation performance

error.scenario: Upstream pipeline producing empty output flagged as failure
error.trigger: Empty output from upstream treated as dependency failure

error.scenario: Enum value not matching target allowed values list
error.trigger: New enum value added at source not added to target schema

error.trigger: Worker memory exceeded physical RAM causing swap usage

error.trigger: New enum value added at source not added to target schema

error.scenario: Source system CPU throttling under sustained load
error.trigger: Cloud instance CPU credit exhaustion

error.trigger: Emergent failure from component interaction not caught in unit testing

error.trigger: Reference data refresh job missed its schedule

error.trigger: Infrastructure migration or IP reallocation

error.trigger: Source soft-delete pattern causing records to reappear in snapshot

error.trigger: Upstream job failed silently without triggering downstream block

error.trigger: Source system removed field assumed mandatory by pipeline

error.scenario: Incremental load missing records from boundary window

error.trigger: Code deployment introducing syntax error in DAG definition

error.scenario: Job timeout too short after infrastructure migration

error.trigger: Worker oversubscribed with concurrent job allocations

error.scenario: Deadlock between two jobs sharing same resource
error.trigger: Two concurrent jobs waiting on each other to release shared resource
